packages.description: Element residual assembly and global system construction for FEMM physics fronts.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-assembly
packages.rustdoc_summary: Finite-element system assembly for the FEMM domain.

packages.description: Codec descriptors and read-construct forms for FEMM model, solution, and field values.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-codec
packages.rustdoc_summary: Codec surface for FEMM model, solution, and field descriptors.

packages.description: Core FEMM types, stable ids, limits, errors, parameter sets, and scalar decoding.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-core
packages.rustdoc_summary: Shared FEMM substrate: core types, stable ids, errors, and domain vocabulary.

packages.description: Derived field projections and sampling for solved FEMM models.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-field
packages.rustdoc_summary: Field representations and projections over FEMM solutions.

packages.description: Deterministic FEMM model fixtures for codec, solve, ODE, and regression tests.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-fixtures
packages.rustdoc_summary: Deterministic FEMM model fixtures for codec, solve, ODE, and regression tests.

packages.description: Pseudo-transient continuation solver for nonlinear FEMM systems.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-flow
packages.rustdoc_summary: Nonlinear solve flow: pseudo-transient continuation and solve diagnostics.

packages.description: Callable FEMM model functions for quantities, fields, solutions, and quality evidence.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-function
packages.rustdoc_summary: FEMM models as first-class callable runtime functions.

packages.description: Symbolic 2D FEMM geometry and lowering to concrete meshing coordinates.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-geometry
packages.rustdoc_summary: Two-dimensional FEMM geometry: nodes, segments, arcs, regions, and labels.

packages.description: FEMM material properties, boundary conditions, sources, and mesh/output policies.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-material
packages.rustdoc_summary: Material, boundary, and source descriptions for FEMM models.

packages.description: FEMM model validation, deterministic meshing, and triangular mesh data structures.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-mesh
packages.rustdoc_summary: FEMM model definition, meshing, and model validation.

packages.description: Explicit ODE right-hand-side adapter and DAE residual contract for FEMM models.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-ode
packages.rustdoc_summary: Time integration of FEMM models as ODE right-hand sides and DAE residuals.

packages.description: Physics front equations for magnetostatic, harmonic, electrostatic, heat, and current FEMM models.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-physics
packages.rustdoc_summary: Governing physics fronts for the supported FEMM formulations.

packages.description: Solved-model quantities for FEMM energy, force, flux, inductance, and field samples.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-post
packages.rustdoc_summary: Post-processing of FEMM solutions into derived quantities.

packages.description: One-call installer for the SIM FEMM stack and its number dependencies.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-prelude
packages.rustdoc_summary: Umbrella prelude that installs the full FEMM library stack.

packages.description: Shared FEMM model query callable substrate for function and sensitivity surfaces.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-query
packages.rustdoc_summary: Shared FEMM model-query callables and payloads.

packages.description: Exact adjoint, direct, and finite-difference sensitivities for FEMM quantities.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-sensitiv
packages.rustdoc_summary: Sensitivity and adjoint analysis of FEMM quantities.

packages.description: Linear solve pipeline, certificates, and exported solve evidence for FEMM models.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-solve
packages.rustdoc_summary: Linear solvers and the steady-state FEMM solve pipeline.

packages.description: Function-space and element-geometry helpers for FEMM meshes.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-space
packages.rustdoc_summary: Function and DOF spaces over the FEMM mesh.

packages.description: Bounded solve cache keyed by FEMM model, mesh, parameter, and solver fingerprints.
packages.name: sim-lib-femm-tape
packages.rustdoc_summary: Solve tape: cached factorizations and solutions keyed by fingerprint.

packages.description: Repository automation wrapper for sim-femm generated documentation.
packages.name: xtask
packages.rustdoc_summary: Repository automation wrapper for sim-femm generated documentation.
